title: Genetic Lab Protocols Guide
author: Umair Masood Awan
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Welcome to Genetic Lab Protocols: Essential Methods and Techniques, a comprehensive guide designed to support researchers, students, and professionals in the field of genetics and molecular biology. The rapid advancements in genetic research have revolutionized our understanding of life sciences, medicine, and biotechnology. However, the accuracy and reproducibility of experimental results remain fundamental to scientific progress. This book aims to provide clear, step-by-step protocols for a wide range of genetic techniques from DNA extraction and PCR to CRISPR gene editing and next-generation sequencing while emphasizing best practices, troubleshooting tips, and critical safety considerations.
